applied_optimizations.name: torch.set_float32_matmul_precision('high') + cudnn.benchmark
applied_optimizations.description: Enabled high precision matmul and MIOpen auto-tuning. Produces correct output but achieves similar performance to reference (~0.83ms).

notes: Problem 71: ConvTranspose2d with stride=1, padding=0, 3x3 kernel, input (8,32,512,1024), output (8,32,514,1026)
100% of GPU time in MIOpen's optimized asm conv kernel - extremely hard to beat
torch.compile, cudnn.benchmark, and matmul precision settings provide correctness but no speedup
MIOpen's ConvTranspose2d implementation is already highly optimized for this shape
Score achieved: 50.0 (correct but not faster than baseline)
Further optimization would require hand-written Triton kernel or aiter library with tuned configs
